svg.text: 16-bit core · LEFT / RIGHT / Z buses · 2 scratch + constant-gen · shadow-register panel — tentative working direction (D-34 / D-35)
Discrete 16-bit register file (G5 / R-HW-4) — all drive LEFT, latch Z; scratch also drive RIGHT
CC · M H I N Z V C
page-table SRAM · kernel / user map sets
Microcoded control (G8) — dispatch by microaddress formation (D-24); WCS boot-copied from EEPROM (D-03)
control word → datapath · ALU · MMU · memory
Front panel — shadow-register display (tentative, G5/G6; debug i/f D-13)
Mirrors each CPU register by latching the Z bus on the matching load strobe →
drives LEDs. So CPU registers need no display tap; only Z + strobes + clock are routed.
